name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-15
title: spec invariant 5 (rabbit-print schema) not enforced by any test
description: Spec invariant 5 declares rabbit-print.schema.json is authoritative for the [rabbit] print format. test-rabbit-print-schema.py validates the schema has expected fields but does not verify that any actual rabbit-workflow hook or CLI script emits text conforming to the [rabbit] pattern. Add a test that greps hook stdout for the prefix and asserts conformance.
